2604.06666.title: A Graph-Enhanced Defense Framework for Explainable Fake News Detection with LLM
2604.06666.paper_summary: Explainable fake news detection aims to assess the veracity of news claims while providing human-friendly explanations. Existing methods incorporating investigative journalism are often inefficient and struggle with breaking news. Recent advances in large language models (LLMs) enable leveraging externally retrieved reports as evidence for detection and explanation generation, but unverified reports may introduce inaccuracies. Moreover, effective explainable fake news detection should provide a comprehensible explanation for all aspects of a claim to assist the public in verifying its accuracy. To address these challenges, we propose a graph-enhanced defense framework (G-Defense) that provides fine-grained explanations based solely on unverified reports. Specifically, we construct a claim-centered graph by decomposing the news claim into several sub-claims and modeling their dependency relationships. For each sub-claim, we use the retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) technique to retrieve salient evidence and generate competing explanations. We then introduce a defense-like inference module based on the graph to assess the overall veracity. Finally, we prompt an LLM to generate an intuitive explanation graph. Experimental results demonstrate that G-Defense achieves state-of-the-art performance in both veracity detection and the quality of its explanations.
2604.06666.paper_summary_zh: 可解釋的假新聞檢測旨在評估新聞主張的真實性，同時提供人性化的解釋。現有的方法結合了調查性新聞，但往往效率低下，且在突發新聞中表現不佳。近期在大型語言模型（LLMs）方面的進展使得能夠利用外部檢索的報告作為檢測和解釋生成的證據，但未經驗證的報告可能會引入不準確性。此外，有效的可解釋假新聞檢測應該為主張的所有方面提供易於理解的解釋，以幫助公眾驗證其準確性。為了解決這些挑戰，我們提出了一個圖增強防禦框架（G-Defense），該框架僅基於未經驗證的報告提供細緻的解釋。具體來說，我們通過將新聞主張分解為幾個子主張並建模它們的依賴關係來構建一個以主張為中心的圖。對於每個子主張，我們使用檢索增強生成（RAG）技術來檢索顯著的證據並生成競爭解釋。然後，我們引入一個基於圖的類防禦推理模塊來評估整體真實性。最後，我們提示一個LLM生成直觀的解釋圖。實驗結果表明，G-Defense在真實性檢測和解釋質量方面達到了最先進的性能。
2604.06666.author: Bo Wang et.al.
2604.06666.authors: Bo Wang, Jing Ma, Hongzhan Lin, Zhiwei Yang, Ruichao Yang, Yuan Tian, Yi Chang
